title: ctenopsis delicatula f. hirsuta
intro: Ctenopsis delicatula f. hirsuta, also known as the hairy ctenopsis or hirsute ctenopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Ctenopsis delicatula f. hirsuta is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
